arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the MemoryDB Access Control List (ACL).

id.description: The unique identifier for the MemoryDB ACL.

minimum_engine_version.description: The minimum engine version required for the MemoryDB ACL.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the MemoryDB ACL, which are key-value pairs for organization and management.

user_names.description: A set of user names that are associated with the MemoryDB ACL.
